items.title: Former US Marine pilot loses appeal against extradition from Australia
items.dek: Daniel Duggan was arrested in 2022 over claims he illegally trained the Chinese military in South Africa.
items.body: Daniel Duggan was arrested in 2022 over claims he illegally trained the Chinese military in South Africa.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Warriors turn back clock to rally, extend season
items.dek: The Warriors, led by Stephen Curry, erased a 13-point deficit in the fourth quarter to edge the Clippers and advance in the NBA's play-in tournament.
items.body: The Warriors, led by Stephen Curry, erased a 13-point deficit in the fourth quarter to edge the Clippers and advance in the NBA's play-in tournament.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Ulberg says he lost UFC title belt celebrating win
items.dek: Newly crowned UFC light heavyweight champion Carlos Ulberg told Fox Sports Australia that he misplaced his title belt while celebrating his victory.
items.body: Newly crowned UFC light heavyweight champion Carlos Ulberg told Fox Sports Australia that he misplaced his title belt while celebrating his victory.
items.author: IriLine Desk
